full_text:
Shen Ying 沈瑩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shen Ying (沈瑩)was born in Wenxian Henei in Sizhou. General of the Left under Sun Hao who was slain during Jin’s conquest of Wu. Shen Ying was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Shen Ying lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
